commits.subject: Day 113 (11:17): Fix stale-task detection: word-boundary match for fail in self-test resolution check (Task 1)

eval.reason: The diff matches the task spec exactly — substring `any(word in lower ...)` replaced with word-boundary `re.search(r'\b(?:flaky|fail|failed|error|retry)\b', lower)`. The targeted verifier (`_self_tests_show_resolution` returns True for "last-failure" + ✅) passes, and the script's self-tests pass.
